Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that loan duration is longer, because longer loan durations increase the likelihood of credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account, because no checking account is associated with a lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that there is no known savings, because lower savings categories show a positive association with estimated credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.
